input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.5.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.5.1
            TITLE: transmission and drive

            CONTENT:
            rule T.5.1: Transmission and Drive
T.5.1 Transmission and Drive 
Any transmission and drivetrain may be used.

final_answer: rule T.5.1: Transmission and Drive T.5.1 Transmission and Drive Any transmission and drivetrain may be used.
